Home / Products / Vertical Blinds

Product Details

Vertical Blinds

A practical vertical system for wide and tall glazing.

vertical blindsoffice blindsvertical blinds Tbilisi

Vertical blinds are especially effective on large windows, in offices, schools, and commercial spaces where you need to manage sun angle and glare. Vertical louvres create an orderly, functional look. Winsome supplies this system for projects that require simple operation, accurate sizing, and durable daily use.

Request Consultation Call Winsome

Features

  • Suitable for large and tall windows
  • Vertical louvre adjustment
  • Practical for office and commercial spaces
  • Easy maintenance and alignment

Benefits

  • Helps control direct sunlight
  • Suits wide glazing and office layouts
  • Maintains a neat, structured appearance
  • Easy to draw and tilt throughout the day

Questions

Frequently asked questions about this product

Are vertical blinds only for offices? +

No. While vertical blinds are traditionally popular in offices, they also work well on large home windows, balcony doors, and studio-style layouts. Vertical vanes make it easier to manage light across a wide opening where horizontal systems can be less practical. Fabric and colour choice can be adapted to residential décors as well as corporate palettes. Winsome assesses stack direction and obstructions during the site visit.

Can a damaged slat be replaced individually? +

Yes. One advantage of vertical blinds is that a single damaged vane can often be replaced without replacing the entire system. This saves cost and downtime when one louvre is stained or bent. Winsome can supply a matching replacement vane sized and coloured to your existing track. We recommend keeping a note of fabric batch where possible for the closest colour match over time.
